title: On Quiet Persistence
author: From: Meditations by Marcus Aurelius
content: You have power over your mind—not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength. The happiness of your life depends upon the quality of your thoughts.
action: Action: Practice internal focus by identifying one thing within your control today.

title: The Diderot Effect
author: From: The Joy of Having
content: Obtaining a new possession often creates a spiral of consumption that leads to further acquisitions and dissatisfaction.
action: Action: Identify one area of your life where 'less is more' and practice subtraction.

title: The Map vs. The Territory
author: From: Alfred Korzybski
content: The description of a thing is not the thing itself. Always verify your models against reality.
action: Action: Replace an assumption with a direct observation or experiment.

title: The Focus Filter
author: From: Essentialism
content: If it isn't a clear 'yes', it's a 'no'. Saying yes to everything is effectively saying no to your highest priority.
action: Action: Decline a non-essential request this week.

title: Radical Responsibility
author: From: Man’s Search for Meaning
content: Everything can be taken from a man but one thing: the last of the human freedoms—to choose one's attitude in any given set of circumstances.
action: Action: Reframe a frustrating situation by choosing your response consciously.
